mapper.select: SELECT Nuser_id, rdate, rtime, equipment_id, permit FROM Restore_table ORDER BY rdate DESC, rtime ASC
SELECT Nuser_id, rdate, rtime, equipment_id, permit FROM Restore_table WHERE Nuser_id = #{nuserId} ORDER BY rdate DESC, rtime ASC
SELECT Nuser_id, rdate, rtime, equipment_id, permit FROM Restore_table WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY rdate DESC, rtime ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Restore_table(Nuser_id, rdate, rtime, equipment_id, permit) VALUES(#{nuserId}, #{rdate}, #{rtime}, #{equipmentId}, #{permit})
mapper.select: SELECT Nuser_id, rdate, rtime, equipment_id, permit FROM Restore_table WHERE permit = '0' ORDER BY rdate ASC, rtime ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE Restore_table SET permit = '1' WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND permit = '0'
